description: Check duplicate labels in DFAX file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr, dnum = chkcntduplidfx(dfxfile)

return_values.name: dnum
return_values.description: Total number of duplicated contingency labels in the dfax file. (output; 0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for function not met.
